narrative:
Morgan Twp township has 819 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.0 percentage points.
